en_title: Control Resonant Has a 2-Day Early Access Through the Digital Deluxe Edition — but Only on PS5
cn_title: 《控制：共振》PS5独占抢先体验引玩家不满
subtitle: 独占抢先，玩家怒了
opus_summary: Remedy Entertainment宣布《控制：共振》将于9月24日发售，但数字豪华版提供的48小时抢先体验仅限PS5平台，Xbox和PC玩家无法享受。此举引发玩家强烈不满，有人表示将跳过该作转投同日发售的《寂静岭：小镇陨落》。9月大作云集，玩家消费将更加谨慎。Remedy新任CEO此前表示《心灵杀手2》和《控制》销量未达预期，正寻求扩大受众，但平台独占抢先体验这一争议策略能否奏效仍有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Control Resonant will have a two-day PS5-exclusive early access, leading to frustration from some fans.
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》将提供为期两天的PS5独占抢先体验，此举引发部分玩家不满。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Remedy Entertainment announced that Control Resonant, the sequel to one of the studio's most beloved games, will release on September 24 . This should've been a moment of celebration, but unfortunately, it has since been overshadowed with news that Control Resonant will get 48-hours of early access through the game's digital deluxe edition, but this is only applicable to PS5. There will be no early access on Xbox or PC, as it appears the 48-hours of early access is tied to PlayStation's marketing agreement for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 昨日，Remedy Entertainment宣布，其最受喜爱的游戏之一的续作《控制：共振》将于9月24日发售。这本该是值得庆祝的时刻，但不幸的是，随后有消息称《控制：共振》将通过数字豪华版提供48小时抢先体验，但仅限PS5平台。Xbox和PC玩家无法享受抢先体验，因为这48小时抢先体验似乎与PlayStation对该游戏的营销协议挂钩。

paragraphs.en: Some fans have stated that they won't be pre-ordering the game or will wait to buy it when it's on sale, as they don't want to support these kinds of practices. "Great, now I know what September game to skip until holiday sales," said one fan in response to the news .
paragraphs.cn: 一些玩家表示，他们不会预购该游戏，或者会等到打折再买，因为他们不想支持这种做法。一位玩家回应道：「太好了，现在我知道9月哪款游戏要等到假期促销再买了。」

paragraphs.en: "Platform-exclusive content is one thing," said another fan . "Platform-exclusive 'early access' while selling the same Deluxe Edition on every platform is another. My money will be going elsewhere."
paragraphs.cn: 另一位玩家表示：「平台独占内容是一回事，但在所有平台销售相同的豪华版，却搞平台独占的『抢先体验』又是另一回事。我的钱会花到别处去。」

paragraphs.en: Early access in games has been a divisive topic for a while now, as it's techncially a way for publishers to charge more for the game's actual release date. After all, is it really "early" if you can pay to play it at the same time as everyone else? It's an easy way to cash in on FOMO, but now it seems to be crossing a line into platform exclusivity.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏抢先体验一直是个争议话题，因为从技术上讲，这是发行商在游戏实际发售日之外额外收费的一种方式。毕竟，如果你花钱就能和其他人同时玩到，这还算「抢先」吗？这是一种利用玩家错失恐惧症轻松赚钱的方式，但现在似乎越界，变成了平台独占。

paragraphs.en: Control Resonant is also releasing on the same day as Silent Hill: Townfall , creating competition between the two titles. In response to Control's early access, one fan stated they'd be skipping it in favor of Silent Hill. "Shame, Silent Hill: Townfall suddenly looks like a much [nicer] purchase on September 24," the person said .
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》还与《寂静岭：小镇陨落》同日发售，两者形成竞争。针对《控制》的抢先体验，一位玩家表示他们会跳过该作，选择《寂静岭》。该玩家说：「可惜了，《寂静岭：小镇陨落》突然看起来像是9月24日更值得买的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: September is already a very crowded month for game releases , as it appears that major titles are considering that a sort of cut-off before GTA 6 begins its domination. Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 will release in October, but that is standard for the franchise and it's arguably one of the only games that can release in close proximity to GTA 6 without taking too much damage. With that said, players are likely going to be pretty selective with their money come September, so publishers are going to have to fight hard to win players over.
paragraphs.cn: 9月本已是游戏发售非常拥挤的月份，因为大作们似乎都将这个月视为《GTA6》开始统治市场前的最后窗口。《使命召唤：现代战争4》将于10月发售，但这对该系列来说是常规操作，而且它可以说是少数几款能在《GTA6》临近发售时不受太大影响的游戏之一。话虽如此，玩家们在9月很可能会精打细算，因此发行商必须努力争取玩家。

paragraphs.en: Recently, Remedy's new CEO, Jean-Charles Gaudechon, stated that Alan Wake 2 and Control should've sold better and is actively looking for ways to expand the audience for those franchises. Whether or not a controversial move like platform-exclusive early access can help with that remains to be seen.
paragraphs.cn: 近日，Remedy新任CEO Jean-Charles Gaudechon表示，《心灵杀手2》和《控制》的销量本应更好，并正在积极寻找扩大这些系列受众的方法。像平台独占抢先体验这样的争议举措能否有所帮助，还有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
